name: Dashboard Exchange
description: Lets you browse, review, and safely import dashboard packages from inside a LogicMonitor dashboard.
requirements: LogicMonitor Text widget raw HTML mode
Viewer permission to see dashboard groups and dashboards
Browser access to configured catalog and dashboard source URLs
known_limits: Uses the viewer's current LogicMonitor browser session for LogicMonitor API calls.
Imports safe copies under a managed Dashboard Exchange group and does not update existing dashboards.
Import is blocked if an existing Dashboard Exchange group is present without the managed marker.
changes: Packaged as an installable dashboard for Curated Dashboard Exchange.

security_review.notes: Contains raw HTML/JavaScript Text widget code. Uses same-origin LogicMonitor dashboard APIs through the viewer's browser session and loads catalog/source JSON from configured public URLs.
